title: Velvety Turkish Beef Stir-fry
description: A spicy, velvety stir-fry featuring tender beef in a rich Turkish-inspired sauce, perfect for a keto-friendly dinner.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium‑high heat.
Add the sliced beef, season with salt and pepper to taste, and sear until browned on all sides; remove from skillet and set aside.
In the same skillet, add the sliced onion and bell pepper; cook until softened, about 4 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional 30 seconds until fragrant.
Stir in the tomato paste, Turkish paprika, cumin, and sumac; cook for 1 minute to bloom the spices.
Return the beef to the skillet, pour in the hot beef stock, and bring the mixture to a gentle simmer.
Cover and reduce the heat to medium‑low; simmer for 5 minutes until the sauce thickens and the flavors meld.
Stir in the butter, adjust seasoning with salt and pepper if needed, and remove from heat.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped parsley if desired.
